Context: Large-scale government/enterprise data platform landing page for system selection.
Description of the screen: A professional, clean Web PC (1440px) entry page for 'GKX Intelligent Decision Platform'. 

Layout:
- Top Header: White background, light gray bottom border. Left side features a professional logo and Chinese name 'GKX 智能决策平台'. Center has a capsule-shaped search bar. Right side contains icons for notifications, help, and user profile.
- Main Content: Light gray background (#F5F7FA). A centered container (1200px) displays a title '选择系统' and subtitle '请选择要进入的业务系统'.
- Selection Cards: Two large, side-by-side white cards with generous padding, large border-radius (12px), and very soft shadows. 
  - Card A (Left): Title '战略咨询智能支持', Description '面向战略研究与咨询成果管理的一体化工作台。', Tags '研究需求', '技术体系', '报告生成', '成果案例'. Primary button '进入系统' (teal/lake blue), Secondary button '查看简介'.
  - Card B (Right): Title '基础研究智能决策', Description '面向基础研究分析与决策支持的数据与模型平台。', Tags '课题分析', '趋势洞察', '预警监测', '知识图谱'. Primary button '进入系统', Secondary button '查看简介'.
- Visuals: Subtle, professional geometric or data-themed line illustrations in the background of each card.
- Footer: Light gray text with copyright, version number, and unit name.

Design Style: Light government/enterprise theme, teal/lake blue primary colors, high whitespace, clean typography, Chinese text.

screens.name: projects/16083068148308144470/screens/232e3ff290b44d20b3ed47d795b0c778
screens.prompt:
Title: GKX 智能决策平台 - 系统选择首页
Context: Large-scale government/enterprise data platform landing page for system selection.
Description of the screen: A professional, clean Web PC (1440px) entry page for 'GKX Intelligent Decision Platform'. 

Layout:
- Top Header: White background, light gray bottom border. Left side features a professional logo and Chinese name 'GKX 智能决策平台'. Center has a capsule-shaped search bar. Right side contains icons for notifications, help, and user profile.
- Main Content: Light gray background (#F5F7FA). A centered container (1200px) displays a title '选择系统' and subtitle '请选择要进入的业务系统'.
- Selection Cards: Two large, side-by-side white cards with generous padding, large border-radius (12px), and very soft shadows. 
  - Card A (Left): Title '战略咨询智能支持', Description '面向战略研究与咨询成果管理的一体化工作台。', Tags '研究需求', '技术体系', '报告生成', '成果案例'. Primary button '进入系统' (teal/lake blue), Secondary button '查看简介'.
  - Card B (Right): Title '基础研究智能决策', Description '面向基础研究分析与决策支持的数据与模型平台。', Tags '课题分析', '趋势洞察', '预警监测', '知识图谱'. Primary button '进入系统', Secondary button '查看简介'.
- Visuals: Subtle, professional geometric or data-themed line illustrations in the background of each card.
- Footer: Light gray text with copyright, version number, and unit name.

Design Style: Light government/enterprise theme, teal/lake blue primary colors, high whitespace, clean typography, Chinese text.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.title: GKX 智能决策平台 - 系统选择首页

design.title: GKX 智能决策平台 - 系统选择首页

outputComponents.text:
已为您生成 GKX 智能决策平台系统的入口首页：

- **入口首页 (系统选择)**：页面采用专业克制的设计风格，背景为淡雅的浅灰色，中央展示两张高质感的系统选择卡片。顶部包含 Logo、全局搜索及个人中心；两张核心卡片通过青蓝色的标签与按钮引导用户进入“战略咨询”或“基础研究”子系统，圆角柔和、阴影轻量，整体视觉呼吸感强。

您是否需要我继续为您设计其中一个系统内部的仪表盘或数据管理页面？

outputComponents.suggestion: 设计“战略咨询智能支持”系统的首页看板
增加一个系统加载或登录页面
调整页面为深色背景模式
